name: IONOS Cloud
description: IONOS Cloud infrastructure and hosting platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to IONOS Cloud
2. Go to Settings → API Tokens
3. Create a new token
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: IONOS Cloud → Settings → API Tokens → Create token

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists IONOS Cloud data centers to verify infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists IONOS Cloud users to verify access is managed
